phonetic: p蓹藢t瑟kj蕣l蓹ra瑟藞ze瑟蕛蓹n
examples: To see without the mechanism of thought is total seeing, without particularization and division, which does not mean that there is not separation and dissimilarity.
Several propounding methods of mathematical pedagogy are discussed, they can be separated into three kinds: generality method, particularization method and imagery description method.
